summary: Tested Looma backend (14/14 pytest passing) and frontend critical flows. Backend auth + video CRUD + analytics + view tracking all working. Frontend landing/features/pricing/signup/login/dashboard/brand/logout flows working. Two minor issues: Record modal create flow could not be verified end-to-end (test ambiguity with multiple 'Create' buttons) and logout redirects to /login instead of landing /.

integration_issues.issue: Could not verify navigation to /app/studio/:id after creating video. Test clicked a 'Create' button (ambiguous with sidebar Create button). Modal likely needs a more specific data-testid like 'record-create-button' on the submit CTA inside RecordModal so test/users can find it. Backend POST /api/videos works correctly when called directly.
After clicking Sign out, user is redirected to /login instead of landing page /. Task spec mentions 'Logout returns to landing page'.

issues: Sidebar label is 'Content Library' but task spec/requirement lists it as 'Library' — minor copy mismatch only.

action_items: Add explicit data-testid='record-create-button' (or similar unique testid) to the primary CTA inside RecordModal so the create flow is reliably testable and unambiguous from the sidebar 'Create' button.
Decide intended logout target: if landing page is desired (per spec), update logout handler in AuthContext/DashboardLayout to navigate to '/' instead of '/login'.
Optional: align sidebar label 'Content Library' with spec wording 'Library' (or update spec).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses @app.on_event('shutdown') which is deprecated in modern FastAPI — consider lifespan handler.
google_session endpoint re-raises HTTPException inside try/except httpx.HTTPError which is fine, but ensure 401 from provider is not masked by 502.
JWT_SECRET read at import time — good. JWT expiry is 7 days, reasonable for v1.
All Mongo queries correctly exclude _id via projection {'_id':0}. Good.
Video ownership enforced via user_id filter on get/patch/delete. Good.
Public /videos/{id}/view increments without rate-limiting — acceptable for v1 but flag for abuse mitigation later.

success_rate.frontend: ~85% (signup/login/landing/features/pricing/protected-redirect/dashboard/sidebar/brand-page/logout verified; record-modal->studio nav not fully verified)

test_credentials: Used dynamically generated TEST_<uuid>@looma.app accounts; testuser@looma.app/TestPass123 from /app/memory/test_credentials.md not pre-seeded but registration flow works.
seed_data_creation: Created several TEST_ users and a TEST_video record via pytest; pytest deletes its created video. UI tests created uitest_<timestamp>@looma.app accounts that remain in DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py is reusable for regression. Frontend: signup form uses data-testid signup-name/signup-email/signup-password/signup-submit. Login form likely uses login-* testids. RecordModal submit button selector is ambiguous — next test should inspect /app/frontend/src/components/RecordModal.jsx to find exact testid before re-running the create-video->studio E2E.
rca of the issue: RecordModal create button: test used button:has-text('Create') which matches sidebar 'Create' menu button (which probably opens a Create menu, not submits the modal). After click, URL stayed at /app meaning either modal didn't open or the click hit the wrong button. Fix: add unique data-testid on RecordModal primary action.
